steps.title: Identify the elaboration
steps.content: The phrase before the blank names the reaction rate of photosynthesis. The words after the blank explain that rate by stating that as light intensity rises, the reaction rate also rises.

steps.title: Rule out weak joins
steps.content: A gives no punctuation between the noun phrase and its explanation. C wrongly adds "and," and D uses a comma where a clearer signal of elaboration is needed. A colon properly introduces the explanation. The answer is B.
